name: VERRA MOBILITY Corp
business: Verra Mobility is a leading provider of smart mobility technology solutions, including toll and violations management, title and registration services, automated safety and traffic enforcement, and commercial parking management. The company serves commercial fleet owners (rental car companies, direct fleets, fleet management companies), governments, universities, parking operators, healthcare facilities, transportation hubs, and other violation-issuing authorities primarily in the United States, Australia, Europe, and Canada.

exposures.sentence: Our proprietary technologies are designed to provide government agencies with the information, data, and automated end-to-end administrative capabilities to enforce traffic violations through photo enforcement.

For many international customers, we design, engineer, and maintain roadside photo enforcement technology, including both hardware and software, which is sold or licensed to government agencies and often maintained with maintenance contracts to support the technology.
We increasingly apply AI to enhance and support certain aspects of our offerings and business processes.

catalysts.sentence: Our contract with NYCDOT expired on December 31, 2025, and we entered into a new contract with NYCDOT, effective January 1, 2026, to manage New York City's automated enforcement camera safety programs for a five-year period.

catalysts.event: Ontario ban on automated speed enforcement cameras
catalysts.sentence: in November 2025, the province of Ontario, Canada enacted legislation banning automated speed enforcement cameras, which led to our Company exiting the province.
